testcase.name: test_create_customer_minimal_no_address
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter138_address_field_type.py:340: in test_create_customer_minimal_no_address assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 even without address, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 even without address, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","line1"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"TEST_Iter138_NoAddr_58544","email":"TEST_iter138_noaddr_58544@example.com","password":"TestPass138!","mark_verified":true}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","city"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"TEST_Iter138_NoAddr_58544","email":"TEST_iter138_noaddr_58544@example.com","password":"TestPass138!","mark_verified":true}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","region"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"TEST_Iter138_NoAddr_58544","email":"TEST_iter138_noaddr_58544@example.com","password":"TestPass138!","mark_verified":true}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","postal"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"TEST_Iter138_NoAddr_58544","email":"TEST_iter138_noaddr_58544@example.com","password":"TestPass138!","mark_verified":true}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","country"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"TEST_Iter138_NoAddr_58544","email":"TEST_iter138_noaddr_58544@example.com","password":"TestPass138!","mark_verified":true}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
